text.title: Supply Chain Security Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the supply-chain config bundle artefact plus valid / invalid / forbidden examples.

section.title: Schema
Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: auto_merge_policy.major == true (major bumps require human review)
license_allowlist contains GPL-3.0 or AGPL-3.0 without legal_signoff_ref

example.title: Empty scanner list + GPL allowed
example.note: Multiple forbidden patterns triggered; reject and re-request.

text.reference: Validator script that enforces this contract.
